suppliers.name: Puori
suppliers.result: Batch-level third-party testing and public wholesale program. Verify EU warehouse, Spanish labels and trade terms.

suppliers.name: Pure Encapsulations España / WeAreNutrition
suppliers.result: Local professional channel and extensive quality process. Wholesale pricing and batch COAs required.

suppliers.name: Hifas da Terra
suppliers.result: Strong traceability and external testing. Request beta-glucans, extraction ratio and batch COA for Mico-Leo.

suppliers.name: Bonusan España
suppliers.result: Spanish wholesale and professional channel with Netherlands production. Audit each SKU and request trade documentation.

suppliers.name: Lamberts Española
suppliers.result: Established Spanish distribution and public GMP/quality information. Confirm ecommerce account and COAs.

suppliers.name: MoleQlar
suppliers.result: Useful EU catalogue and B2B program. Only whitelist reviewed food supplements; exclude chemicals, NMN and doubtful SKUs.

suppliers.name: Avea Life
suppliers.result: Premium brand with Spain storefront and B2B login. Verify EU operator, labels, COAs and claims.

suppliers.name: Timeline / Mitopure
suppliers.result: Differentiated premium product. Start affiliate-only and verify Novel Food conditions and Spanish logistics.

suppliers.name: LiveHelfi
suppliers.result: Large EU assortment and affiliate program. Useful to test demand, but every SKU needs independent review.

suppliers.name: Momentous
suppliers.result: Excellent public batch COAs and third-party certification. Not viable for Spain until EU distribution and labels are confirmed.
